compiled_state.title: Add CI perf-regression job for hyperfine-based regression suite
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Task

Add a CI job that runs the performance regression suite on Linux reference hardware after ticket-lib-api.sh changes.

### CI Integration Options (choose simpler)

Extend existing `.github/workflows/ci.yml` with a new job `perf-regression`:
```yaml
perf-regression:
  runs-on: ubuntu-latest
  needs: [test]
  steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Install hyperfine
      run: curl -LO https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/download/v1.18.0/hyperfine_1.18.0_amd64.deb && sudo dpkg -i hyperfine_1.18.0_amd64.deb
    - name: Run per-op regression suite
      run: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-perf-regression.sh
    - name: Run aggregate workflow benchmark
      run: bash tests/scripts/benchmark-sprint-workflow.sh
```

Trigger: on push/PR when `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh` or `tests/perf/` changes.

If extending ci.yml would cause .github/workflows/ conflicts with existing jobs, add a standalone `.github/workflows/ticket-perf-regression.yml` instead.

## Testing Mode

GREEN — CI configuration; validate via yaml lint.

## File Impact

- .github/workflows/ci.yml OR .github/workflows/ticket-perf-regression.yml (UPDATE or CREATE)

## Acceptance

- CI job named perf-regression or equivalent exists
- Installs hyperfine before running tests
- Triggers on ticket-lib-api.sh or tests/perf/ changes
